title: holstia tenuifolia var. glabrata
intro: Holstia tenuifolia var. glabrata, commonly known as a variety of the Japanese angelica tree, is a plant species that belongs to the family Apiaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in traditional medicine for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Holstia tenuifolia var. glabrata include reducing inflammation and pain, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antiseptic and antibacterial agent. Herbal preparations of this plant can be consumed as a tea, used as a tincture, or applied topically as a cream or oil, although its uses and availability may vary depending on the region and cultural practices.
